title: SQL Query Optimization for Common Table Expressions
scenario: You are tasked with optimizing the performance of a SQL query that uses Common Table Expressions (CTEs). The query is taking too long to execute, and you need to write an optimized SQL query that improves its performance.
constraints: Must use a CTE to simplify the query
Must optimize the query for performance

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the optimized query improve execution time?
Is the optimized query readable and easy to understand?
Is the optimized query overly complex?
